title: FNaF's Universe & Fanverse
description: The mod is designed for entertainment
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3739084a95d465ce2c9b01b5397fe903101eb7e0.png)This mod is released in early access version 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1,19,4 and 1.20.1
in fashion you will see high-quality models of the animatronics themselves, there are beautiful realistic animations,
all the necessary decorative blocks so that you can build a pizzeria or any other building, all sorts of fnaf songs,
all people associated with fnaf. (there will be many other fnaf parodies such as: TJOC, Candy's, Rachel's, DORMITABIS, etc.).<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eOo0Xhs8swI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>!

Donation for the development of the mod, the one who donates your nicknames will be on the video reviews of the teasers - [donationalerts](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/fantomchik717)

_**[https://discord.gg/WpTr3MGE7B](https://discord.gg/WpTr3MGE7B)**_: discord server community
**_[https://discord.gg/4VFqAfZ2MW](https://discord.gg/4VFqAfZ2MW)_**: discord server developers
